name: Never on Sunday Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring cream and half-and-half to a simmer in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Add sugar and cocoa; stir until the sugar dissolves. Remove from heat.
3. Add chopped chocolate; stir until smooth.
4. Gradually whisk 1/2 cup of chocolate mixture into eggs.
5. Return the mixture to the saucepan.
6. Stir over medium-low heat for 10-15 minutes or until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
7. Strain into a bowl. Cool mixture completely, stirring often.
8. Stir whiskey into the custard.
9. Pour into a 1-quart ice cream churn.
10. Freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
11. Store in a covered container for several hours to mellow the flavor. If the ice cream is frozen solid, soften in the refrigerator before serving.
